title: Rocket Fire
lesson: Blast off! Almost to the castle! Read these long sentences to fuel up the rocket!
sentences: The dog can run with you today.
We can shop and get some gum.
The kid will swat a big bug.
The camp is near the big pond.
The kid can spot the red fox.
The bug is under the soft rug.
We can rest well in the tent.
The duck went right to the pond.
The bird is still on the perch.
She can swim fast to the dock.
He just lost his hat at park.
We sang the best song at camp.
The frog hid very well in mud.
She got the first star on test.
The bird sang a song for her.
